title: Penalty; unlawful operation of service car
doc_html:
§191.  Penalty; unlawful operation of service car

Whoever violates R.S. 45:184 through 45:190 shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars or imprisoned not more than ninety days, or both.
doc_text:
§191.  Penalty; unlawful operation of service car
Whoever violates R.S. 45:184 through 45:190 shall be fined not more than one hundred dollars or imprisoned not more than ninety days, or both.
